mapper.sql: select p.profile_id, p.student_user_id, coalesce(nullif(su.nick_name, ''), su.user_name, p.student_name) as student_name, p.parent_user_id, coalesce(nullif(pu.nick_name, ''), pu.user_name, p.parent_name) as parent_name, pu.user_name as parent_account, p.grade_name, p.class_name, p.gender, p.interest_tags, p.status, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.remark from edu_student_profile p left join sys_user su on su.user_id = p.student_user_id left join sys_user pu on pu.user_id = p.parent_user_id

where.if: and coalesce(nullif(su.nick_name, ''), su.user_name, p.student_name) like concat('%', #{studentName}, '%')
and coalesce(nullif(pu.nick_name, ''), pu.user_name, p.parent_name) like concat('%', #{parentName}, '%')

mapper.insert: insert into edu_student_profile (student_user_id, student_name, parent_user_id, parent_name, grade_name, class_name, gender, interest_tags, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values (#{studentUserId}, #{studentName}, #{parentUserId}, #{parentName}, #{gradeName}, #{className}, #{gender}, #{interestTags}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.delete:
delete from edu_student_profile where profile_id in
#{profileId}
